result:
# V2 Product Launch Plan — Working Back from SaaStr (September 2026)

SaaStr Annual is typically held in **mid-September**. I'll anchor to **Tuesday, September 8, 2026** as the launch target (adjust if your date differs). Today is May 30, so you have **~14 weeks**.

## Reverse Milestone Timeline

### 🚀 Launch Week — Sept 7–11
- **Sept 8:** Public launch at SaaStr (press release, website live, demo booth)
- Sales team activated, customer success ready, monitoring war room

### Week -1: Aug 31 – Sept 4 — Launch Readiness
- Final code freeze (no changes except critical fixes)
- Press embargo briefings (TechCrunch, SaaStr Media, key analysts)
- Internal all-hands launch rehearsal
- Demo booth materials shipped to venue

### Week -2: Aug 24–28 — GTM Rehearsal
- Sales enablement complete (battlecards, pricing, demo scripts)
- Customer reference stories finalized (3–5 logos)
- Partner co-marketing assets locked
- Launch landing page in staging

### Weeks -3 to -4: Aug 10–21 — Beta Wrap & Polish
- Close private beta; collect NPS + testimonials
- Performance, security, and load testing complete
- Documentation, API reference, help center published
- Pricing & packaging finalized

### Weeks -5 to -6: Jul 27 – Aug 7 — Private Beta
- 15–25 design partners onboarded
- Daily feedback triage; ship weekly improvements
- Onboarding flow battle-tested

### Weeks -7 to -8: Jul 13–24 — Feature Complete
- All v2 features merged to main
- Internal dogfooding begins
- Begin recording demo videos & product tour
- Analyst briefings scheduled (Gartner, Forrester)

### Weeks -9 to -10: Jun 29 – Jul 10 — Code Complete on Core
- Core v2 features feature-complete (UI freeze for marketing screenshots)
- Brand/launch creative direction approved
- PR agency briefed; press list confirmed

### Weeks -11 to -12: Jun 15–26 — Build Sprint
- Engineering executing against locked scope
- Marketing site wireframes → design
- SaaStr booth design & logistics confirmed

### Weeks -13 to -14: Jun 1–12 — Foundation (starts Monday!)
- **Lock v2 scope** (must-have vs. nice-to-have)
- Confirm SaaStr exact date, booth, speaking slot
- Name v2, finalize positioning & messaging
- Identify design partners for beta
- Kick off PR agency engagement

---

## Critical Path Risks to Watch
1. **Scope creep** — lock by June 12 or the date slips
2. **SaaStr logistics** — booth/speaking deadlines often close 60+ days out
3. **Beta partner recruitment** — start outreach this week
4. **Press cycle** — pitch under embargo 3 weeks pre-launch

## Immediate Next Steps (This Week)
- [ ] Confirm exact SaaStr date & secure booth/speaking slot
- [ ] Schedule scope-lock workshop for week of June 1
- [ ] Draft beta partner target list
- [ ] Brief PR/comms lead

Want me to break any phase down further, build a RACI, or draft the scope-lock agenda?
